content.thinking: Let me start by trying to access the DevOps pipeline page using Playwright. I'll write a script to do this.

arguments.command: node -e "const { chromium } = require('playwright'); (async () => { const browser = await chromium.launch({ headless: true }); const page = await browser.newPage(); await page.goto('https://devops.devcloud.ztgame.com/projects/yyzy/pipelines', { waitUntil: 'networkidle', timeout: 30000 }); console.log('URL:', page.url()); console.log('Title:', await page.title()); const content = await page.content(); console.log('Content length:', content.length); console.log('First 2000 chars:', content.substring(0, 2000)); await browser.close(); })().catch(e => console.error('Error:', e.message));"

arguments.prompt: 这是一个DevOps流水线页面。请列出所有可见的流水线名称，特别关注名称中包含"1V1"或"1v1"的流水线。对于每个流水线，请描述：1) 流水线名称 2) 最近执行状态（成功/失败/运行中等）3) 其他可见信息（如触发方式、时间等）
